narrative:
Centerville-D (precinct in Montgomery County) has 939 registered voters, with 64.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
